title: Portal Class
description: Represents a portal containing multiple applications.

constructors.name: constructor(element?: HTMLElement)
constructors.description: Initializes a new instance of the Menu class from element.

parameters.name: element
parameters.description: The element for which to create Menu control.

properties.name: readonly element: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the root element of the control.

properties.name: readonly applications: Application[]
properties.description: Gets all applications available in the portal.

properties.name: readonly taskbar: Taskbar
properties.description: Gets the taskbar of the portal.

properties.name: readonly overlay: Overlay
properties.description: Gets the overlay of the portal.

methods.name: add(application: Application): Application
methods.description: Adds an application to the portal.

parameters.name: application
parameters.description: The application to be added to the portal.

returns.description: Returns the same application instance to allow for method chaining.

methods.name: addManifest(manifest: ApplicationManifest): Application
methods.description: Adds an application manifest to the portal and returns the newly created application.

parameters.name: manifest
parameters.description: The manifest used to create the application.

methods.name: get(id: string): Application | undefined
methods.description: Gets the application by its unique id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique id of the application.

overloads.name: open(): Promise<void>
overloads.description: Opens the first application that has manifest.startup set to true.
overloads.remarks: An error is thrown if no application has manifest.startup set to true. <mark>No application with startup set to true was found.</mark>

overloads.name: open(id: string): Promise<void>
overloads.description: Opens the application with the specified id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique id of the application.

overloads.remarks: An error is thrown if no applications are found. <mark>No application with id '${arg1}' was found.</mark>

overloads.name: open(application: Application): Promise<void>
overloads.description: Opens the application that was added to the portal.

parameters.name: application
parameters.description: The application to be opened to the portal.

overloads.remarks: An error is thrown if the application fails to load.
